title: JS Leaves+
description: This resource pack improves the foliage in Minecraft by adding volume to it.
body:
Replace the default model of leaves, grass, flowers for a more enjoyable game

### **_JS Leaves+ for mods:_**
- Biomes O' Plenty **[download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/js-leaves+-for-biomes-o-plenty)**
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone **[download](modrinth.com/resourcepack/js-leaves+-for-biomes-weve-gone)**
- Regions Unexplored **[download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/js_leaves+-for-regions-unexplored)**

![Sample items in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8538c414dac3b3cdf054d949420e242d1b7193b_0.webp)

### For a complete picture and full immersion, we suggest installing rp [Plump Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/volumetric-crop-models).
